name: Chicken Monterey with Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds frying chicken, cut into 8 pieces
15 oz. black beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together olive or vegetable oil, salt, dried oregano, coarsely ground pepper, and ground cumin for chicken seasoning.
3. Place chicken pieces on a broiler pan and brush with half of the oil mixture. Broil 4-6 inches from heat, turning once and basting with remaining oil mixture until chicken is fork tender (25-30 minutes).
4. Meanwhile, place black beans in a 2-quart saucepan.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until heated through for 5-7 minutes.
6. Stir in green onions and jalapeno.
7. Serve beans over chicken and sprinkle with shredded Monterey Jack cheese.
